B. 2025 MCAHPS Format Tables 26 

sa_deemd_cpmt: Generic Level for Copay Computation 

SAS Format: $GENLEVF 

N: N/A 

sa_deemd_lis: Deemed for Low Income Subsidy 

SAS Format: $ID_F 

N: NO 

U: UNKNOWN 

Y: YES 
 sa_disbld: Disabled Flag 

SAS Format: $ID_F 

N: NO 

U: UNKNOWN 

Y: YES 

sa_fpl_pct: Federal Poverty Level Percent Code 

SAS Format: $FPL 

1: BELOW 100% FPL 

2: 100% OR ABOVE FPL 

9: UNKNOWN 

sa_incarc_sw: Incarceration Flag 

SAS Format: $ID_F 

N: NO 

U: UNKNOWN 

Y: YES
